---
title: "Cheat Sheet — Evaluation Toolkit Recap"
subtitle: "Applied Machine Learning for Marketing"
description: "A one-page quick reference for yardstick metrics and rsample resampling — the same toolkit from the codebook, condensed for fast lookup during Module 4 and beyond."
date: today
---

## Quick Reference

This one-page cheat sheet condenses the metrics and resampling toolkit from
the codebook into a fast lookup you can return to anytime — useful when
you're applying the same workflow to a new model in a later module and just
need a reminder of the right function call.

::: {.callout-tip}
The PDF below is embedded directly in the page. If it doesn't display
properly in your browser, use the **Download PDF** button underneath to
open or save it directly.
:::

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="eval_toolkit_recap.pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="850"
  style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px;"
>
  <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs.
  <a href="eval_toolkit_recap.pdf">Download the PDF instead</a>.</p>
</iframe>
```

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 1rem;">
  <a href="eval_toolkit_recap.pdf"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     style="
       display: inline-block;
       padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem;
       background-color: #B8860B;
       color: white;
       font-weight: 600;
       font-size: 1rem;
       border-radius: 6px;
       text-decoration: none;
     "
  >
    ⬇ Download PDF
  </a>
</div>
```
